'''Gra'aton''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Gra'aton achieved the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] circa [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]. Gra'aton studied as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]], specializing in the field of diplomacy and becoming a well-respected [[Jedi Diplomat|diplomat]]. On a mission assigned by the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]], Gra'aton was part of a relief effort to [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] that included fellow Masters [[Vulatan]] and [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], as well as at least fourteen [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. Attempting to salvage the wreck of the lost [[Praxeum ship/Legends|praxeum ship]], the ''[[Chu'unthor]]'', the Jedi were met with the [[Witches of Dathomir]], who guarded the wreck from the Jedi. After losing fourteen Padawans to the Witches, Yoda negotiated the release of the surviving passengers of the ship and received the guarantee of the Witches to protect the ship's treasures from the violent [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]], a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] worshiping local cult consisting of female members.<ref name="TCP" />
